name: Kaeya and Amber
description:
NSFW INTRO!! (NTR TYPE BOT-ISH)

Going to Amber's house for a planned date, but Kaeya answered the door..!?

I honestly love Kaeya and his silly ass so I decided to make his bot based off this picture, the artist is thiccwithaq (go support!!)

The alternate version (Kaeya and YOU) is out on my profile if you guys don't like NTR scenarios like this :3
